notes: SHIP v1.14.293 - Ship 4 design-call #3 (owner-ruled Option A in chat: 'retire the whole askrow'): the Command askrow is RETIRED. Removed the markup block (#pg-cmd .askrow = the Ask tile .apill + one .rpill reserved slot) from the Command page. SCAN-ID quick-action DROPPED per recon: cmd_route('work','scan') / the hero SCAN verb already opens the universal 'Scan Anything' ScanDispatch/ZXing scanner, which auto-classifies rack/switch/optic/ASSET-serial - so a SCAN-ID tile would be a second door to the same scanner (One-door-per-feature violation), and the only non-duplicate (a bespoke asset-forced capture) has thin value while Master carries zero serials fleet-wide. Recon also corrected a stale premise: the live askrow was Ask + ONE reserved slot (2-wide 50/50), not two. Feature-integrity checked: 'Ask PHANTOM' (openVaSheet) is NOT orphaned - still reachable via the qa-voice 'Ask Voice Assistant' button (L12941) and the command-palette keyword action (L40804, fires on ask/voice/help me). No JS references the row (askrow/apill/rpill appear only in CSS + the removed markup) so nothing null-derefs. SCOPE: markup-only retire; the now-dead CSS families (#pg-cmd .askrow/.apill(+children)/.rpill base ~L9164-9178, the desktop @media askrow/apill block ~L9804-9826, the .292 body.rd #pg-cmd .apill override L11551, and the orphaned .apill.ls-pill LOG-pill rule ~L4631) are TOMBSTONED for the CLEAN window (next chain item) - deliberately not deleted here to keep this a minimal, low-blast-radius markup ship. Command column is now statusrow -> lens -> stats -> nba -> trow -> OPS SIGNAL. Three-stamp .292->.293; braces 11748->11748 unchanged (HTML markup, no braces); CRLF preserved. DEVICE-VERIFY (John): the Ask/Reserved row is gone from Command (trow now sits directly above OPS SIGNAL); Ask PHANTOM still reachable from the voice button + command palette. Remaining Ship-4 call: #4 hero MAG STRIP (renders only when deploy_countBlockers()>0) + BLOCKER verb accent. Then CLEAN window (askrow CSS tombstones + R3 BOM tombstones).
